# Vendored Hermes Agent Source

Source: https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent
Branch: main
Commit: c6b0eb4de0e5010a752e312c0577a4d04d2a08a5
Vendored-at: 2026-06-16T04:53:25Z

This directory is intentionally vendored into projeto-ens-unificado so Soluções Nexus AI can customize Hermes core code and build the VPS image from the repository source instead of pulling hermes-agent from PyPI at build time.

Do not commit secrets, local virtualenvs, node_modules, cache folders, or runtime Hermes data here.
